empty.title: No workspace yet
empty.description: Create your first workspace to index sources.

sources.title: Git sources ({{count}})
sources.empty: No sources. Add one to get started.

delete.title: Delete source
delete.warning: This removes the source. Already indexed documents remain.

model.title: Indexer model
model.immutableNote: The model is immutable. Changing provider or model would invalidate all vector dimensions and require a full reindex, not supported in this version.

reveal.title: Reveal API key
reveal.warning: Displays the API key in plain text. Continue?
reveal.copyHint: Copy the key now — it will be masked in 30 seconds.
reveal.autoMaskNote: The key will be automatically masked in 30 seconds.

rotate.title: Rotate API key
rotate.warning: This immediately invalidates the current key. Existing agents will need to be reconfigured.
rotate.copyHint: New key generated. Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
rotate.oneTimeWarning: One-time display: the key won't be accessible after closing (except via Reveal).

reindex.title: Reindex
reindex.warning: All workspace sources will be re-synced. Unchanged documents are skipped (SHA-256 deduplication).

delete.title: Delete workspace
delete.warning: Deletes the workspace + its pgvector database + all indexed documents. Irreversible.
